# Hurricane ICS Pull Request

## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist
- [ ] I reviewed parser behavior impacts and updated fixture expectations if needed.
- [ ] I validated changed ICS routes (`/ics`, `/ics/day/:day`, `/ics/artist`).
- [ ] I tested share link and clipboard copy flow on mobile/desktop.
- [ ] I confirmed stale-cache behavior (`/api/concerts`, `/api/status`) when upstream parse fails.
- [ ] I added/updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I included updated UI screenshots for any frontend changes (desktop + mobile).

## Notes
If this PR changes deployment behavior, please mention expected manifest updates.
